children.label: i
children.text: a part B institution (as defined in );section 1061 of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: a Hispanic-serving institution (as defined in );section 1101a of this title

children.label: iii
children.text: a Tribal College or University (as defined in );section 1059c of this title

children.label: iv
children.text: an Alaska Native-serving institution (as defined in );section 1059d(b) of this title

children.label: v
children.text: a Native Hawaiian-serving institution (as defined in );section 1059d(b) of this title

children.label: vi
children.text: a Predominantly Black Institution (as defined in );section 1059e of this title

children.label: vii
children.text: an Asian American and Native American Pacific Islander-serving institution (as defined in ); orsection 1059g(b) of this title

children.label: viii
children.text: a Native American-serving, nontribal institution (as defined in );section 1059f of this title

children.label: B
children.text: a consortium of institutions described in subparagraph (A); or

children.label: C
children.text: an institution described in subparagraph (A), or a consortium described in subparagraph (B), in partnership with any other institution of higher education, but only if the center of excellence established under is located at an institution described in subparagraph (A).section 1033a of this title

children.label: A
children.text: means research that applies rigorous, systemic, and objective procedures to obtain valid knowledge relevant to reading development, reading instruction, and reading difficulties; and

children.label: i
children.text: employs systemic, empirical methods that draw on observation or experiment;

children.label: ii
children.text: involves rigorous data analyses that are adequate to test the stated hypotheses and justify the general conclusions drawn;

children.label: iii
children.text: relies on measurements or observational methods that provide valid data across evaluators and observers and across multiple measurements and observations; and

children.label: iv
children.text: has been accepted by a peer-reviewed journal or approved by a panel of independent experts through a comparably rigorous, objective, and scientific review.
